activities_projects.title: Compare Secular and Non-Secular States
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between secular and non-secular governments
steps: Write the meaning of a secular state
Write the meaning of a non-secular state
List two differences between them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands types of state and role of religion

activities_projects.title: Religious Freedom Examples
activities_projects.objective: Understand the right to practice religion
steps: Write three examples where people practice their religion freely
Explain why this freedom is important
Relate it to secularism

activities_projects.title: Case Study: Conflict and Harmony
activities_projects.objective: Understand how secularism helps reduce religious conflicts
steps: Write a situation where two religious groups disagree
Explain how government rules can solve the problem
Explain how secularism helps maintain peace
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of secular laws

activities_projects.title: Fundamental Rights and Religion
activities_projects.objective: Understand constitutional rights related to religion
steps: Write the Fundamental Right related to freedom of religion
Explain it in simple words
Give one real-life example

activities_projects.title: Government Actions for Secularism
activities_projects.objective: Identify actions taken by the government to maintain secularism
steps: List three ways the government maintains secularism
Explain each point briefly
Discuss with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises role of government in protecting secularism

activities_projects.title: Religious Diversity Survey
steps: Ask five classmates which festivals they celebrate
Write the festival and religion
Prepare a small table showing the diversity

activities_projects.title: Secular Values Poster
activities_projects.objective: Promote values of equality and tolerance
steps: Write key values like equality, respect, freedom of religion
Add illustrations or symbols of different religions
Display the poster in class

activities_projects.title: Role of Law in Secularism
activities_projects.objective: Understand how laws protect religious equality
steps: Write two laws or rules that protect religious equality
Explain how they prevent discrimination
Give an example
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands legal protection of religious freedom

activities_projects.title: Short Essay on Secular India
activities_projects.objective: Explain why India is called a secular country
steps: Write a short paragraph on secularism in India
Mention religious diversity
Explain why equality among religions is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the concept of secular India

activities_projects.title: Discussion: Respecting Differences
steps: Discuss why respecting other religions is important
Write two points from the discussion
Explain how it helps maintain unity
